100.$description: Default duration. Pick the step that matches the size and emphasis of the motion.

easeIn.$description: Ease-in curve. Use for elements leaving the viewport — slow start, accelerating exit.

easeInOut.$description: Ease-in-out curve. Use for movements that both originate and settle on screen (e.g. expansions in place).

easeOut.$description: Ease-out curve. Use for elements entering the viewport — fast start, gentle settle.

emphasized.$description: Emphasised easing curve. Use for transitions that should feel more expressive (e.g. brand-led page transitions, hero reveal motion).
